ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT LACKNER, MATIAS

DEFENDANT MATIAL LACKNER, ALAMO FINANCING'S MOTION FOR ORDER OF REFERRAL TO MEDIATION IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE NOR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. COURT ORDERED CASE REMOVED FROM JUDICIAL ARBITRATION AND REFERRED TO MEDIATION. ORDER SIGNED. COURT ORDERED CASE SCHEDULED FOR A MEDIATION ENFORCEMENT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON 3/28/2007 AT 10:00 AM, IN DEPARTMENT 212. COURT ORDERED A JURY TRIAL DATE OF 8/13/2007 AT 9:30 AM, IN DEPARTMENT 206. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Of Referral To Mediation
Off Calendar Feb-08-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendant Matial Lackner, Alamo Financing's Motion for Order of Referral to Mediation is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Court ordered case removed from Judicial Arbitration and referred to Mediation. Order signed. Court ordered case scheduled for a Mediation enforcement Order to Show Cause on 3/28/2007 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Court ordered a Jury Trial Date of 8/13/2007 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206. Court to give notice of the Trial Date and Mandatory Settlement Conference. Proceedings reported by: Susan Lee, CSR# 4280. (212)
